_note: Provisional ground truth harvested via the chatbot on 2026-06-27 because GET /api/catalogues/* is blocked by a corporate proxy here. Verify against /api/catalogues/{policy_map,feature_map,fee_schedule} on an unproxied network before trusting as oracle.

fees._source: Real values from the Account > Service fees UI panel (authoritative). The chatbot returned WRONG amounts for overdraft/replacement/expedited when harvested — see execution-results.

eligibility.note: ISA and Growth Bond are Premium-only; a Standard customer is eligible for Flex Saver only. The bot/UI claiming 2 is the eligibility-over-count defect.
